message:
style(tools): hoist unicode_normalization import, use let-else for match

- tools.rs: move `use unicode_normalization::UnicodeNormalization` to
  top-level imports (fixes clippy items_after_statements); refactor
  match-with-None to idiomatic let-else pattern
- .beads/issues.jsonl: 1 new task entry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
